scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix Barcode-1 && npm install --prefix "Legal mapping" && npm install --prefix "legal pro/AI Legal Portal" && npm install --prefix dashboard
scripts.dev:ai: npm run dev --prefix "legal pro/AI Legal Portal"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --hide "barcode,mapping,ai,backend,coverletter" --kill-others -n "barcode,mapping,ai,dashboard,backend,coverletter" "npm run dev:barcode" "npm run dev:mapping" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:coverletter"
